code: import{createContext,useContext,useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(()=>{const u=localStorage.getItem("user");return u?JSON.parse(u):null;});const login=(userData,token)=>{localStorage.setItem("token",token);localStorage.setItem("user",JSON.stringify(userData));setUser(userData);window.dispatchEvent(new Event("userChanged"));};const logout=()=>{localStorage.removeItem("token");localStorage.removeItem("user");setUser(null);window.dispatchEvent(new Event("userChanged"));};const updateUser=updated=>{localStorage.setItem("user",JSON.stringify(updated));setUser(updated);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{user,login,logout,updateUser},children:children});}export const useAuth=()=>useContext(AuthContext);
